description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs, linux and windows, each running on a different environment. The linux job uses an ubuntu-latest container, installs dependencies, sets up the Vulkan SDK, configures CMake, builds the project, and uploads the artifact. The windows job uses a windows-latest environment, installs dependencies, sets up the Vulkan SDK, configures CMake, builds the project, and uploads the artifact.
